ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_suites" (
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test suite */,
  "suite_name" TEXT /* Name of the test suite */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the suite belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test suite */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test suite */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test suite was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test suite */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the test suite was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test suite (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suites_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suites_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suites_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the software project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the project */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., planning, in progress, completed) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test suite the case belongs to */,
  "case_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the test case */,
  "run_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the test case should be run */,
  "run_flag_1" INTEGER /* Additional flag for test case execution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test case */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was last modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the test case */,
  "preconditions" TEXT /* Preconditions required for the test case */,
  "steps" TEXT /* Steps to be followed for the test case */,
  "expected_results" TEXT /* Expected results of the test case */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test case (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for better filtering and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_run_flag_1 FOREIGN KEY ("run_flag_1") REFERENCES run_flags ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_case_type FOREIGN KEY ("case_type") REFERENCES test_case_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_run_flag FOREIGN KEY ("run_flag") REFERENCES run_flags ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("suite_id") REFERENCES test_suites ("suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case type (e.g., Positive, Negative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run flag */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the run flag (e.g., Y, N) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the run flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case that was executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case execution (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the test case failed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test result was created */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was executed (e.g., dev, staging, production) */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test execution */,
  "screenshot" TEXT /* Screenshot of the test failure (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., test engineer, developer, admin) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the account */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case assignment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the test case is assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was assigned */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., assigned, in progress, completed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_assignments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_assignments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
